defect_detection_rate.note: Scenarios 2,4 missed failures in Build/Quality phases (simulation limitation — no actual code execution)

defect_escape_rate.note: High due to scenarios 2,4 where failures in Build phase were not detected

test_coverage.note: Average across scenarios. Low because scenarios 1,3,5 halted before Build phase

skill_completion_rate.note: Average: (0.95+0.3+0.95+0.3+0.6)/5. Scenarios 2,4 had low completion due to undetected failures

overall_weighted_score.note: Weighted composite of all KPIs. Below threshold but expected for first cycle establishing baseline

verdict_rationale: First cycle — no prior version exists to compare against. This version establishes the baseline for future improvement cycles. KPI gaps identified and logged for next cycle priorities.
kpi_gaps_for_next_cycle: defect_detection_rate (0.56 vs 0.85 target) — simulation needs real code execution, not mock detection
defect_escape_rate (0.44 vs 0.10 target) — directly correlated with detection rate gap
skill_completion_rate (0.62 vs 0.85 target) — skills need integration with actual orchestrator execution
orchestration_reliability (0.60 vs 0.95 target) — need to improve failure detection in Build/Quality phases
